name: Midnight Gala
signature: Theater-marquee bulb-lights chase around the couple's names, champagne bubbles rise continuously across the whole page, a burst of gold light-flares fires from the open button on click, every card carries a diagonal gold sash ribbon, the RSVP sits inside a perforated gala-ticket stub, and a maximized three-layer field of floating + parallaxed gold sparkles (stars, gems, rings) covers all 14 sections over a subtle navy velvet texture.
brief: A full concept pivot, by explicit request, away from the original 'anti-floral/ceremonial bold geometric' brief — now an evening-gala ballroom mood: navy-dominant, gold ornamental, glamorous rather than stark. Includes the full standard section set (Susunan Acara with icons, Dress Code, Hashtag & Instagram, quick-nav, auto-scroll, per-section background photos, which are admin-controlled and independently togglable).
